mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id as transactionId, dat_id as datId, transaction_type as transactionType, amount, balance, description, branch, transaction_date as transactionDate FROM DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{datId} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL ( dat_id, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, branch, transaction_date ) VALUES ( #{datId}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balance}, #{description}, #{branch}, #{transactionDate} )
